summary:
ISRAEL AND UNITED STATES ALIGNMENTS: Brandon states that the week of the Super Bowl will bring great spiritual alignments and acceleration, specifically noting discussions in Washington regarding the United States' role in Gaza. Brandon believes the land belongs exclusively to Israel and describes a developing partnership between the United States and Israel akin to the biblical relationship between Jonathan and David. Brandon claims to have seen a three-strand cord representing new covenants, which he asserts will bring temporary financial prosperity to America as the country supports Israel. Brandon also mentions praying for the protection of Donald Trump and his family, referencing threats from spies within the government and a potential Red Dawn scenario.

SPIRITUAL COVENANTS AND RESTORATION: Brandon details a vision concerning the founding fathers of the United States establishing a blood covenant with God at Plymouth Rock. Brandon explains that while God maintained His side of the agreement, America compromised the covenant through decades of faulty leadership across political parties. Brandon states that the covenant was nearly broken until Donald Trump's alliance with Israel acted as a bridge, strengthening the connection through a three-strand cord. Brandon also describes seeing supernatural blessings on Israel, including massive undiscovered oil and natural gas reservoirs, as well as giant, healthy agricultural products resulting from the Abrahamic Covenant.

GEOPOLITICAL SHIFTS AND MILITARY ACTION: Brandon outlines predictions for the Middle East following Donald Trump's upcoming inauguration on the twentieth. Brandon foresees a strong relationship between Trump and Benjamin Netanyahu, leading to swift, strategic military strikes against targets in Iran and Syria. Brandon states these actions will severely cripple Iran's financial and nuclear capabilities. Brandon describes the deployment of previously unused weapons and a heavy naval presence in the Mediterranean and the Strait to reestablish global respect for America, comparing the approach to a stronger version of Ronald Reagan's administration. Brandon also mentions renewed domestic oil drilling, pipeline establishment, the building of the Third Temple, and a peace accord involving Saudi Arabia.

IRAQI DINAR REVALUATION AND FINANCIAL WARNINGS: Brandon shares a message he received regarding the upcoming reinstatement and revaluation of the Iraqi Dinar. Brandon warns that the exchange rate will be lower than many expect and cautions against holding onto the currency in hopes of a higher rate, stating there will only be a small window of opportunity to exchange it. Brandon emphasizes the importance of paying government taxes on this sudden wealth, referencing Richard Hatch's prison sentence as a cautionary tale. Brandon advises being thankful for the financial windfall, noting that the funds are blood money tied to the sacrifices of armed forces in Iraq. Brandon also briefly suggests studying cryptocurrencies like XRP and XLM, and mentions Brad Garlinghouse.
rawData: [February 06, 2025]-[What the Lord told me about the dinar]-[https://youtu.be/SrLXLpmsP-k]-[Hey everybody, I'm just going to get right to it. I have a little eleven-minute clip here of everything that I've prophesied about Israel and the acceleration of the Jonathan and David relationship. The Lord pointed me to the week of the Super Bowl and said, 'Watch the week of the Super Bowl.' I kept telling everybody in the past videos that it's going to be a great acceleration around the Super Bowl. What I have seen in the last forty-eight hours, just praying over things in this fasting time that I've had with the Lord, He showed me that this time right now—from Tuesday, Wednesday, and Thursday—would be a time of great alignments in the spirit. We are seeing that right now in Washington, with the United States saying, 'Hey, we're going to take over Gaza,' which I don't know about. I'm just saying I'm praying over that because the land should only belong to Israel in my opinion. The United States is saying they're occupying; I haven't got to read into that yet all the way to say if we're truly saying what we're saying or if this is like a partnership, kind of like a friendship, like this Jonathan and David type of relationship. When this happened, I saw a three-strand cord that is not easily broken. I saw covenants being made, and as we bless the land of Israel, I saw great financial prosperity coming on America for a season. This is whenever you're seeing in part and hearing in part, and whenever there's a depth perception in the spirit realm. I warned you all about the Red Dawn; I told you there are people within our government that are not good, who have been hired as spies. I'm trying to be discreet, but I'm just saying there are things we need to pray about on our YouTube prayer channel here to take our authority and keep protecting President Trump and his family. Now he says he's going to the Super Bowl, and I told everybody, 'Watch the Super Bowl.' I've had a check about the Super Bowl, but it hasn't been very intense as of the last two days. It was intense about a week ago, and I was talking to somebody on the phone who asked what I was praying about. I said the Super Bowl. I don't understand why, but it's about the Super Bowl again, so I'm interceding for the Super Bowl. They said they were feeling something about it too. Like I said, it's not as intense, and I know I'm talking fast because I have a lot to say. You'll see this in this video: when the spirit of the Lord comes on me, I feel pulses. It's an intensity of how serious of a timeframe we're looking at and how imminent it is. The more I feel that urgency, I pray into it in tongues and I just ask the Lord to give me more sight to see into it. If I need to know anything, warn me of things to come; that's what I do as a watchman on the wall. What you're about to see are things that I have been praying over for the last six months or so about Israel, the Jonathan relationship, and praying over the Strait—the passageway where all the oil tankers come through—and praying over strategic strikes against Iran to make them where they don't have nuclear capabilities. Thank you for watching this; I hope this blesses you all. Right after that, I'm going to tell you all about the Dinar and what the Lord has showed me. I saw in the land of prophecies, Israel, and in that sea where Israel owns a massive reservoir of oil and natural gas that will be tapped into; it's worth billions and billions over the next four years. Great financial wealth will flow through Israel. I saw their agriculture; I saw fruit the size of, like, ginormous. I don't know if they're oranges—I don't even know if they grow oranges, folks—but I saw fruit that was ginormous and vegetables that were beautiful and healthy. The Lord said it's the Abrahamic Covenant, a supernatural breathing on it, an evidence showing that God is God over Israel. It will come through blessing, favor, and wealth as America backs it, and favor and blessing and wealth come on America. I saw the founding fathers making a covenant with the Father. There were two sides of the covenant: this side was their side of promises where they would make their allegiance to the Father, and the Father's side was His side to a man. It was great and strong on the Father's side because He's always held up His agreement. It was strong like a tie in the spirit realm, and I could see it through time. I could see George Washington and all the great men—the pilgrims at Plymouth Rock—making that covenant with the Father. It looked like blood, a blood covenant, with strands of muscle and tissue that made it bound together. The Father's side was strong and has never altered, but we have entered into compromise. There were barely even just a few threads left before that covenant was broken—basically a breach of contract because we did not hold up our end of the agreement. But the Father's side was completely strong. I saw as Donald Trump made an alliance with Israel, it saved the contract because it blessed Israel. As the covenant made with us in America was getting weaker, God had every right to cut it completely, but He is rich in mercy. When Donald Trump comes in, I saw him bridge the gap of the covenant of our founding fathers to make it strong by blessing Israel. We did not hold our agreement to be one nation under God like we should have; we've let compromise in and done things that have been ungodly with all kinds of parties, Republican and Democrat. It has been several decades of faulty leadership. It's like a third layer grew on top, and it was a golden glowing thread as we bless Israel that made us have a lifeline over America. Because it's a three-strand cord, it made it a strong covenant again. It's like a Jonathan and David relationship about to happen with Israel and America. This is going to be a different relationship than we've ever seen before between Benjamin Netanyahu and Donald Trump. The moment Trump is inaugurated on the 20th, I saw him come out like a lion and I saw strategic plans of taking out key select targets in the Middle East within a small span of time. I'm talking about using the military like a chess game, and I saw Iran crippled financially. A great setback is coming to Iran regarding their nuclear capabilities and technology. I saw weapons that the United States has never used before in battle being used against foreign adversaries. I saw a heavy military presence—aircraft carriers and battleships—in the Mediterranean and around the oceans there as an intimidation like you've never seen before in that Strait where they're always picking on those ships. The respect that America has lost with our foreign adversaries over the last four years is going to be restored. We have been the laughingstock of the world, but when he comes in, respect will be restored back to America. It's a type and shadow of Ronald Reagan coming back into power, but even stronger. People are going to take America serious again. We are going to have to pray for protection around him, but a major bulldog is coming on the scene, more aggressive than he was his first four years. I saw him hitting strategic targets in Iran and Syria. It's going to look like shock and awe. I saw a cracking of a whip over the Middle East and strategic alliances being formed. It is like a sign in a window saying, 'We're back in business.' I'm talking drill baby drill—you're going to see oil like you've never seen it before. You're going to see pipelines being established and people who were laid off getting their jobs back. It's about putting America first and a return of patriotism. When I was praying, the Lord showed me that the Third Temple is about to be built and that Trump will have a major part in bringing forth the peace accord with Saudi Arabia and other nations. Well, good morning family. I'm wearing the same thing I wore yesterday because these are back-to-back videos. I want to tell you what the Lord told me about the Dinar. I was just praying while getting barbecue at the drive-thru, and all of a sudden the Lord said, 'I want to talk to you about what's coming with the Iraqi Dinar.' I said, 'get the recorder,' and my son grabbed it and my wife started praying. The Lord said, 'Brandon, this is about to take place.' I saw a reinstatement of the Dinar bringing value and a wealth transfer for the people. But He said they are going to sucker-punch you at the banks with the spread, which is the fee they're going to charge to try to rip you off. I saw a rate that was smaller than what people were going to be happy with, because you've been told big rates like the old three-dollar rate. The Lord told me that many would say, 'I'll only cash in some and wait for it to go up more.' Do not do this. I saw that people would sit on their Dinar and they would lose it all because it was a small window of opportunity to exchange. The Lord said, 'Pay your taxes. Do not try to cheat the government.' You will make a big mistake if you spend the money and say you'll pay it later. I saw brothers and sisters from the body of Christ who were foolish and spent it all, then went to prison because they didn't pay the taxes. Remember Richard Hatch who won Survivor and went to prison for it? It's not a game. Give to Caesar what is Caesar's and be thankful for the blessing. For some of you, this will be startup money to do something greater. I saw a windfall for a lot of families, things you've been believing for happening in a 'suddenly.' It will happen overnight in a twenty-four-hour period. It will be a time of great blessing but also disappointing for some because of a vision of grandeur, expecting twenty million and walking away with one million. You can't get discouraged about a million dollars! The Lord said to be thankful and ask the Holy Spirit to breathe on it. I saw that waiting for a higher rate would be a trap. I study crypto a lot now and I pray for wisdom. I told Diana to study it too. Who is involved in this? Brad Garlinghouse, or whatever his name is—Brad Garlinghouse. Who is this from XRP or XLM? Study to show thyself approved. The Lord said this is blood money; many men and women in the armed forces died for Iraqi freedom and stability. Do not take it lightly. We honor the sacrifice of the families and the military members. If this doesn't witness with you and you're expecting a hundred million, then God bless you, but don't say I didn't tell you so. I diversify my eggs so I'm not disappointed. I'm looking to Jesus to supply my needs according to His riches and glory. Don't try to box God in; He has a million ways to get a blessing to you. Father, I thank You for all my brothers and sisters. We lift them up before You. We thank You that You are the God of more than enough. I'm not going to be a spoiled brat who wanted a Ferrari and got a Porsche; we are grateful for all You have done. We call healing and wholeness over every person today, from the top of their head to the soles of their feet. We pray over President Trump and the decisions he is making with tariffs, that You lead him with a Solomon-type anointing. We pray for divine protection over his family. We thank You that he would pressure this to happen with the Iraqi Dinar for the body of Christ. We uncover every plot of the wicked and any 'Red Dawn' experience they would try to carry out. I thank You for revival and the greatest harvest of souls the world has ever seen. Lord, You said judgment begins in the house of the Lord and You're cleaning house to awaken the people. I call for healing over bodies, for cancers, diabetes, and high blood pressure. I call for healing over dementia, Alzheimer's, and autism. I speak to glaucoma and cataracts and say, 'Eyes, line up in the name of Jesus.' I call for ears to pop open. I speak to teeth and gums for gingivitis to be healed. I say in the name of Jesus, this gum disease is healed. I thank You for a creative miracle where teeth were falling out. You say that's impossible? All things are possible to him who believes. You say, 'Well, I've already had a denture.' No, He'll give new ones. I call for healing over flat feet and painful arches. I thank You for promotions and management positions. We take authority over poverty and lack; this is the season of overflow. I call the flu healed and whole—bird flu, swine flu, it doesn't matter. I command the flu to go. I call stomach viruses and fevers to break. I call for a refreshing over the homes and the mothers who are tired from taking care of sick babies. Shake off the depression and anxiety; let Jesus fill you with joy. Diana and I agree that your children are whole and well. We lift up the single dads and the grandparents raising grandchildren. God is going to give you grace to finish it. Be refilled with the fire and glory today. Jesus said, 'Come unto me all ye that are heavy laden and I will give you rest.' His yoke is easy and his burden is light. We pray this video blessed you. It's for entertainment purposes only, but pray over it and see what the Lord tells you. Click the likes and the notification button. We're growing to over 500,000 now. Put a smile on your face and a song in your heart. God bless you all and we will see you soon. Bye-bye.]
